programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se declara culpable del asesinato de la madre de Soraya para salvar a Nandito.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó
programme.desc: Ezequiel le dice al almirante que el "Alacrán" era Pedro Medina, el almirante le exige que le diga la verdad a su esposa Carlota y le pide que renuncie a su cargo político. Fabiola transfiere su dinero a la cuenta de Graciela para que esté a salvo.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa y Aurora se encuentran con Rubén en la primera comunión del hermano de Esperanza. Teresa se pone celosa al ver a Aurora cerca de Mariano. La familia de Esperanza se entera de que Rubén es casado. Esperanza encuentra a Rubén con Genoveva.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Fuertes sospechas
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Verdad revelada
programme.desc: Paulina le cuenta a Donato que es una usurpadora y le pide que no la le traiga más problemas con los Bracho. Piedad hará lo que sea para evitar que Carlos Daniel se divorcie de Paola.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: El manantial: El accidente
programme.desc: Alejandro encuentra el automóvil del padre Salvador y lo salva. Alfonsina va tras Alejandro y Margarita.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Unión y separación
programme.desc: Elisa decide decirle a Leonardo que lo mejor es separarse y no seguir con su amor. Darío le pide a Victoria que se convierta en su aliada. Majo descubre la traición de Clara.

programme.title: Una familia de diez: Entre el bote y el agujero
programme.desc: Plácido está en la cárcel y Pierre trata de abonar la fianza, pero queda libre Jacinta. Los López tratan de tapar el agujero porque, si no lo hacen, se irán a la calle.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acompaña a Fran a la boda de Karime y se encuentra con Emilia, una exalumna que reprobó en la universidad.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura como orgánica e inorgánica y Germán es el encargado de dicha misión. Alejandra descubre que un niño de la escuela molesta a Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: La euforia por el feng shui y por limpiar desata un conflicto entre familias. Doña Lucha y María intentan controlar a todos con el feng shui, y organizan un concurso.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles
programme.desc: En su búsqueda por trabajo, Albertano es contratado por María de todos los Ángeles pero sucede una tragedia que Rosa Aurora tendrá que arreglar.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Hans Pujenhaimer enfurece al ver que uno de los camarógrafos no hace el conteo debido para empezar la grabación. Sammy y Miguel Luis muestran su nueva "Sección Imposible" con el tema del Día de Reyes.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Alz y Heimmer discuten sobre la boda de sus abuelos. En el noticiero "DMS por la noche", los locutores discuten sobre las noticias que exponen. El máximo exponente de la cinematografía, don Oscar, muestra sus mejores películas.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: Cipriano elige a Vitor como el empleado del mes y recibe de premio una noche en la suite presidencial del hotel. Vitor es atacado por Chabelita, don Chava lo salva y le dice que todos los huéspedes son zombies.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le dice a Cipriano que un reportero va a ir al hotel. Anita cree que el reportero está muerto y un investigador va al hotel, cuando descubren que el reportero no murió, el investigador lo arresta por cometer muchas infracciones.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos: Casi famoso
programme.desc: Albertano es estafado por una mujer que promete volverlo un famoso cantante, pero durante su presentación todos descubren la farsa de su voz.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Vico decide hacer la audición para ser la nueva vocalista de la banda. Lola le confiesa a Roberta el gran amor que siente por Santos. Mia logra que Sol no se quede en la banda.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Luján sufre al saber que Teo decidió terminar su relación. Diego se encela al ver a Roberta besándose con Nikki. Alma sospecha que Octavio no es el buen hombre que dice ser. Gastón lleva a cabo sus planes para deshacerse de Luján.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Lola sufre al saber que Santos jamás se enamorará de ella. Diego se molesta al saber que Roberta le robó sus canciones. Gastón lleva a cabo sus planes para hacerle la vida imposible a Luján.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Giovanni tiene muchos problemas para escribir una carta dirigida al director. Jose se enoja con Roberta porque no le contó que Teo la engaña con Raquel. Roberta planea destruir Rebelde. Mia logra que Selina le confiese su plan.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego y sus amigos hacen un plan para que Roberta vaya a su departamento. Sol vierte pegamento en el cabello de Mia. Roberta rechaza a Iñaki porque ella no quiere tener novio. Mia les muestra a sus amigas que recuperó su cama en el dormitorio.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Luján quiere renunciar a la escuela. Alma se preocupa cuando encuentra una carta de Roberta donde le dice que se irá por unos días, pero Roberta ha decidido irse de manera definitiva. Roberta se deprime al recordar su solitaria infancia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mia contrata a un estilista para que le quite el pegamento que Sol le echó en el cabello. Diego le confiesa a Iñaki que pasó la noche con Roberta. Mia cobra venganza y le juega una broma pesada a Sol.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Pascual trata de arruinar el concierto de RBD en beneficio de los niños de la calle. Roberta se las ingenia para dejar la escuela incomunicada y estropear las intenciones de Pascual. Roberta no quiere contarle a su mamá que Diego la secuestró.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Rufino y Dinorah tienen un terrible accidente al intentar huir del pueblo. Pablo realiza una búsqueda para encontrar a Rufino y hacerlo pagar por todo el daño que le ha ocasionado a Julia.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Dinorah le confiesa a Julia que Fausto siempre fue el amor de su vida. Juan de Dios le pide a Mireya una nueva oportunidad para poder enamorarla. Finalmente, Julia se casa con Pablo, y viven su amor con intensidad y pasión.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Las dos hijas de Roberto nacen el mismo día y él no sabe que hacer para que Pepa se aleje. Pepa enfurece al enterarse que la hija legítima de Roberto nació el mismo día que la suya.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Pepa roba a la hija de Regina y la registra como si fuera suya. Regina crece bajo el nombre de Renata y con una familia diferente, alejada de su verdadera madre.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Gonzalo se emociona al enterarse que su hijo Matías volverá a la ciudad. Gonzalo ve a Rafael abrazando a Renata y le pregunta si tiene algo que ver con él, ella le dice que solo son amigos.

programme.title: Cuando me enamoro
programme.desc: Fina le pide a Roberta alejarse de Rafael. Roberta le dice a Rafael que deben escapar juntos porque sus padres se oponen a su relación.

programme.title: Cañaveral de pasiones
programme.desc: Julia le reclama a Juan de Dios por haberle ocultado que él embarazó a Mireya. Julia le confiesa a Juan de Dios que Rufino es el padre de Mireya. Josefina descubre que Dinorah era la amante de su marido.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una historia de infinitos líos familiares y una denuncia sobre la injusta situación femenina.

programme.title: El Cielo y Tú

programme.desc: Kent McGowen was obsessed with the idea of being a ‘Superman Cop'. He was so obsessed that he was willing to go against official procedures and manipulate evidence in order to set up a scenario involving one arrest, and another arrest warrant for 42-year old mother Susan Diane Harrison - who had previously complained about him. McGowen then willingly executed the arrest warrant himself, all through unlawful means. Susan was killed just 6 seconds after McGowen forcefully entered her home. To this day the convicted murderer insists on his innocence - that he asked Susan to lower her gun and acted in self-defence after a stand-off. But nothing adds up. The autopsy acts as a roadmap to the truth.

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Caroline and Josh see Real Potential
programme.desc: The very pregnant Caroline and Josh need out of his parents' house, where they're bunking to save money. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses, in which they can build a family. And it must happen asap as Caroline's due in a month! Once Caroline and Josh buy, Sarah renovates the one room that stands out as b-a-d. Baby arrives just as Sarah and crew bring this room to the finish line!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Tova and Marnie see Real Potential
programme.desc: After slogging through over a hundred open houses and losing numerous bidding wars Tova and Marnie are itching to get out of their tiny condo. Sarah comes to the rescue, showing them the potential in three houses that offer the space and practicality they each crave. Once Tova and Marnie buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that takes it from so-so to hellooo!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Andrea and Wayne see Real Potential
programme.desc: As this newlywed's family starts to grow it's time for their home to do the same. Andrea and Wayne are hunting for charm and character that for one means turnkey and for the other means DIY. Sarah shows them the potential of three houses that are livable, but somewhat needy. Once Andrea and Wayne buy, Sarah renovates the room they can't figure out, setting them on course for future renos!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Truc and Eric see Real Potential
programme.desc: Judging by Truc's massive shoe collection and Eric's DJ gear, these two have long grown out of their tiny city apartment. Their failed home to date search has been driven solely by charm and character. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes that tick these boxes with extra storage to boot. Once Truc and Eric buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that allows them to live larger than ever!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Jasmine and Kevin see Real Potential
programme.desc: They first thought buying a home would be easy. Seven months later Jasmine and Kevin are still living in a hotel room, undecided whether they should live downtown or in the suburbs. Sarah shows them the potential of three homes, betting that she can help them bridge their location tug of war. Once Jasmine and Kevin buy, Sarah renovates the one room in their new home that puts a lasting polish on a diamond in the rough!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Christa and Mike see Real Potential
programme.desc: How's this for pressure? Christa and Mike have 30-days to buy, seven-week old baby in tow! Sarah shows these two the potential of three suburban homes, each with fewer stairs than their current townhouse. Good thing, as Mike breaks his leg part way through the search. Once Christa and Mike buy, Sarah tears apart and renovates their deal breaker room, giving them a treat they so deserve!

programme.title: Real Potential
programme.sub-title: Evette and Jason see Real Potential
programme.desc: After two-years of renting in the suburbs Evette and Jason are ready to commit. The issue: while the houses they've been viewing hare new, they're surprisingly not very well cared for. Sarah shows them the potential of three suburban homes, trying to mitigate the quirks they've seen time and again. Once Evette and Jason buy, Sarah wrangles sense and style into the one room in their new home that remains a puzzle!

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Simple dishes show off the flavor of new peas and asparagus. We'll make a Cheater's Chicken Stock (when there's no homemade stock on hand), a bright green Spring Pea Soup, a quick, tender and lemony Peas and Cipolline dish, and Halibut with Asparagus and Salsa Genovese. We'll see the vineyards of the wine country covered in golden mustard blossoms, and drop in on the Mustard Festival.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Foods that warm the heart and soothe the soul. A ten-minute technique for making olives bright and lively, homemade mozzarella, which we serve en carrozza – in a "carriage" of bread dipped in egg and anchovies – and turkey polpettone filled with a center of melting cheese. We'll learn the stories behind the valley's scenic, historic stone walls.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Discover a lemon marinade and other secrets for preparing artichoke hearts. We'll sear a sea bass and make an artichoke salad with red onions, kalamata olives, lemons, and other Mediterranean flavors. We'll cook baby lamb chops and artichokes and serve them with a creamy, tangy egg-lemon sauce. And we'll cross the hill to see the other food and wine-loving valley, Sonoma.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Soup makes a meal and, with a few techniques, becomes a sauce the next day for fish, poultry or meat. Summer Corn Soup, served warm or cold, makes a beautiful yellow sauce for scallops. Tart apples and sweet butternut squash make a soup that becomes a full-bodied sauce for pork chops. We'll visit a ghost winery and meet some third-generation California winemakers.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Our favorite pantry secret stays in your freezer. Compound butters are flavored with fresh herbs and spices, rolled into logs, and kept cold to retain all their flavor. We'll make a Garlic Thyme Butter, a Basil Chive Butter for steak, bruschetta or corn, and a Bagna Cauda Butter for fresh clams and pasta. And we'll visit some of the architectural gems of the Napa Valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: A real farmer's breakfast with potato hash, eggs, and Damn Hot Peppers. We'll finish with Verbena Coffee and a refreshing honey zabaglione that you can make ahead and chill or serve warm. We'll drop in on Michael's hometown of Turlock, California.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Don't toss that stale bread! Breadcrumbs transform goat cheese into a warm, flavorful salad and make Veal Milanese golden brown, crispy, and fork tender. We'll visit some happy goats to see why Sonoma goat cheese is some of the world's best.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Some foods are sexy because of their texture or flavor, and some are sexy because of how they're served. These are the foods we'd cook for a very important evening. A lush seafood stew with scallops, shrimp, mussels, clams and Pernod, a whole-leaf Caesar salad made to be eaten with your fingers, and a silken Caramel Panna Cotta. We'll visit Greystone, one of the oldest buildings in the valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: We take you along to the biggest charity event in the Napa Valley and then come back home to make some late-night favorites: a home-style onion soup, a spicy spaghetti Amatriciana, and dried-fruit compote flavored with Sambuca.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: When the temperature drops, foods should deepen in flavor. These are the dishes we make when it's cold outside. A Chicken Bolognaise that's lower in fat than the traditional version, Fennel Roasted Vegetables, and a cheesecake made with flavorful mascarpone.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Pesto is much more than basil and pine nuts. Learn the technique and make tomato pesto (with our infamous flowerpot chicken and bruschetta), walnut pesto and even your own pesto with the flavors you choose. Meet some olive growers who make olive oil in the Napa Valley.

programme.title: Michael Chiarello's Napa
programme.desc: Italians make this bread and vegetable salad in the summer with fresh tomatoes and garlic. We show how to make it all year long, with a springtime asparagus panzanella, a classic summer version, and with veal medallions to serve as a main course. We'll tour Main Street, St. Helena, and see some of the valley's most charming stores and restaurants.

programme.title: Chasing Coffee
programme.desc: The pursuit of the sweetest "honey" coffees on earth unleashes an adventure that includes "coffee monkeys", crocodiles, toucans, an exploration of the active crater of Volcan Poas, and surfing on the coast with a coffee farmer. The Costa Rican paradise reveals a uniquely artistic approach toward colorful honey coffees stored like wine and served just in time for a classic "coffee sock" brew.

programme.title: Mile High Mayhem
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo, the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house, but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party. And with Sonia's hands tied, she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane. The team takes to the skies, but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team? Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control?

programme.title: Reclaim the Plane
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo, the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars. But after two members of the team bail when it's time to save the company, will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence?

programme.title: First Rule of Repo
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia encounter a city employee who tries to give them the boot, and a mechanic's shady scheme comes crashing down on Matt and Ronnie. But with Froy still in debt to Sonia, an RO's offer to make a quick buck convinces Froy to break the first rule of repo.

programme.title: Natural Liar
programme.desc: First, Froy and Ronnie dodge tomatoes and pesticide when an organic farmer won't give up his tractor, and when they are in the clear, Froy confronts Ronnie about telling Sonia about the boob purchase and inadvertently reveals the Lambo repo. Next, Carlos and Matt get an offer of stardom from a slick Hollywood agent. And finally, Sonia drags more information from Ronnie and doesn't understand why everyone's going behind her back with Froy's big Lambo repo. Plus, they lose control of a Chevy Impala while repoing from a mace wielding shopper.

programme.title: The Froylan Job
programme.desc: A hoarder with a secret tries to pull a fast one on Matt and Froy, and Sonia takes sides in a dramatic lover's quarrel. Froy finally gets a shot at recovering the Lamborghini, but will his ingenious plan come crashing down around him?

programme.title: Tricks and Treats
programme.desc: First, a mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car. Next, Froy and Ronnie have to put hands on a seriously stupid sugar daddy and the recently upgraded debtor's chest when they repo from a stripper who will do anything to keep her car. And finally, Matt and Carlos go head to head against a boxing manager and his fight fixing fighter.

programme.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold, but have to put discussion on hold while they repo repo a hovercraft golf cart from a snooty golfer. Next, Sonia and Ronnie's easy day at the salon gets disastrous when the should-be debtor serves Sonia with a lawsuit. And finally, Froy and Carlos head out to a worksite to repo the bulldozer that Carlos should have been training for.

programme.title: Taken for a Ride
programme.desc: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase. Matt offends a pretty RO who seeks womanly revenge, and Froy and Carlos go undercover at a lowrider show. And when Sonia announces a dangerous plan to save the company from the lawsuit, the team must decide whether they're willing to risk it all.

programme.title: The Final Finale
programme.desc: On this special one hour series finale of Operation Repo, the team are scrambling to get ready for the huge Yacht repo to secure the sale of the company and the distribution of their severance packages, while still going after every day repos. In this episode, Sonia and Froy find a payment procrastinating pervert in the park, Matt and Ronnie put the brakes on a rich racecar driver, Matt and Carlos get stuck in the middle of sign maker's gluing process, and Ronnie and Carlos try to reason with an irresponsible retro racist. And finally, on their most dangerous repo ...

programme.title: It Ain't No Joke!
programme.desc: In this kick-off to the final season, the cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series. And, get a sneak peek of the final season of Operation Repo.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off
programme.desc: First, Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them. Later, things get heated for Matt and Sonia just before they head out with Esteban and Lou to ambush a helicopter pilot.

programme.title: Collectibles
programme.desc: First, Lou, Lyndah, and Matt head to a cul-de-sac to gain possession of a speedboat, and a truck, and a trailer. Later, a rare collectible motorcycle is up for repo, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are ready to collect it. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou nab a forklift from a threat-dealing debtor.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

45365 explores the congruities of daily life in an American town. From the patrol car to the courtroom, the playground to the nursing home, the parade to the prayer service, it explores relationships and interactions - with people and their environment. The stories of a father and son, a young relationship, cops and criminals, officials and their electorate coalesce into a mosaic of faces, places, and events. 45365 is a portrait of a city and its people. Directed by Turner Ross and Bill Ross IV.

Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: Hardly any other area is as unspoiled as the Yukon Delta in western Alaska. This fascinating network of swamps and river arms looks like a landscape at the beginning of mankind. Only 25,000 people live in this barren region, which is almost as big as Greece. Most of these inhabitants are indigenous and belong to the ethnic group of the Yupik. They make their living on the steep banks of the Yukon River. And in their villages, built on piles to protect them against flooding, you can see the effects of climate changes on nature - and on the community life of the indigenous population. On the trail of the national fish of Alaska, the salmon, the film follows the Yukon River and follows moose hunters, migratory birds and scientists who do research in the delta.

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Nature's Survivors
programme.desc: Every year, the Earth is hit by cyclones, earthquakes, volcanoes and floods. These events make the headlines, with alarming human death toll numbers. But what about animals? This one-hour special explores how animals cope with natural disasters – before, during and after the events themselves. Animals have gone to great lengths to make the most out of some very perilous predicaments, and future climate change could force them to make even more changes in order to survive.

programme.title: River Jaws
programme.desc: Wells catfish! Over the last fifty years, it has colonised most of Europe's rivers - even the most polluted. This intruder has become the largest freshwater animal in Europe, and even hunts on shore ... 3 years of intense filming were necessary to capture this unique wildlife film.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Heli Platform to Platform Jump, Barber Shop, Container Launch
programme.desc: This episode features four co-ed pairs competing as teams. In the first stunt, both team members leap back and forth between two platforms hanging from helicopters with each person transferring up to 10 flags from one platform to the other and then jumping in the water. The three teams to get highest flag total will advance to the next round. In the second stunt one team member is seated in a barber chair and their partner spins them. When the chair stops, they have to get whichever haircut their head was pointing to. There are six haircuts they can get. Teams would advance to the finals if both members got their designated haircuts. In the finale a crane lifts a large container to 200 feet in the air, both team members have to climb rope ladders hanging from the container. Once they reach the container, they both have to scale a narrow ledge on the side, collect two Allen wrenches, and climb another ladder to the top. Once on top, they have to use the wrenches to unscrew hatches and climb down into the container. When they were both inside, they have to touch two pieces of a live wire together in order to blow themselves out of the container and into the water below. The team to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champions at winning $50,000. This week competing in the Home Invasion is the Frederickson family of Hagerstown, Maryland.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: The Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard discovers hidden terms in her legal contract with the World's Greatest Attorney, Sophia Lopez. Ms. Lopez is seemingly playing a final hand by forcing a legally bound Tessa Blanchard into a match against a deadly mystery opponent. Adrenaline appears critically injured from being jumped by Exile and as such, her WOW World Tag Team Champion partner Fire is taking a stand. But it turns out the scorned Exile members aren't the only WOW Superheroes willing to deceive and harm the champs in pursuit of the tag team championship titles. Impressive newcomer and barrel riding champ, Casey Dakota makes her in ring debut. And the long history of battles that have ensued between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side members: Holidead, Siren, and the possessed Princess Aussie culminate into an all out war, resulting in the most shocking act that has ever taken place in WOW.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Tonight has “feud” written all over it with two of The Fabulous Lana Star's past prodigies joining forces to teach Lana and her newest prodigy a lesson. Will the ghosts of Lana's past haunt her in the ring forever or does she have a plan to prevail? Tessa Blanchard's shocking disqualification from last week's battle with Venomous costs her much desired championship rematch against The Beast. The Dixie Darlings make a peace offering to Jessie Jones. And Stephy Slays bravely takes up for her friend against The Temptress and The Dagger who attacked Keta Rush in the alley.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Will the spirit of The Lioness be killed by last week's attack or will she demonstrate the resolve to continue? Jessie Jones uses the Dixie Darlings and a tactical argument to secure a shot at the WOW Tag Team Championship Titles. The events between The Psycho Sisters and The Dark Side: Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie have been escalating for weeks. Fury and Mezmeriah take to the ring to defend Razor after Siren set fire to her face in an unsanctioned brawl. And an unexpected competitor wants to join The Psycho Sisters.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: With Keta Rush injured, can Stephy Slays find a new partner to help end Exile's reign of brutality? The Psycho Sister's leader Razor was taken out by a vicious and fiery attack last week. WOW veteran Spike joins forces to help even the odds against Holidead, Siren, and Princess Aussie. The Lioness returns to the ring for the first time since suffering humiliation and betrayal at the hands of Lana Star and Team Blondage. Former WOW World Champion, Tessa Blanchard is hungrier than ever for her shot at The Beast, but she must first claim victory in tonight's Number One Contender match against a treacherous competitor.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Under suspicious and unusual circumstances, The WOW World Tag Team Championship is on the line tonight. Who will walk away with the most prestigious tag team titles in women's wrestling? New WOW Superhero Adriana Gambino denies allegations made against her family while making her in-ring debut. And the IQ Superior, Samantha Smart employs a new “hands on” strategy with The Disciplinarian.

programme.title: WOW Women Of Wrestling
programme.desc: Champion Santana Garrett wants revenge on Tessa Blanchard for what she did to her beloved father. Jungle Grrrl reminds Santana that she never pinned her shoulders to the mat to become Champion. Born Legend, Tessa Blanchard gets what she wants...a shot at the Championship. It is a triple threat match that you won't want to miss!

programme.title: My Road To WOW — The Secrets Of The Superheroes
programme.desc: In MY ROAD TO WOW, the stars of Women Of Wrestling reveal the challenges they had to overcome – and how WOW gave them the inspiration and passion for wrestling, and the drive to become WOW Superheroes.

programme.desc: The designers are pleasantly surprised when each one of them gets a special guest from home. But the emotional reunions with their mothers, daughters, and friends are quickly overshadowed by the drama of the next challenge when the designers learn that their newly arrived loved ones will also be their clients—and there is $50,000 on the line! Olivia Culpo and Katia Beauchamp join the judging panel.
